speaker: speaker1
text: Excuse me , Sir , do you know what time it is ?

speaker: speaker2
text: Oh , it ’ s almost eleven twenty .

speaker: speaker2
text: You ’ re welcome . The rain is quite heavy , isn ’ t it ?

speaker: speaker1
text: Yeah . I was in a hurry and I forgot my umbrella today .

speaker: speaker2
text: I have one . We could share it . Which way are you going ?

speaker: speaker1
text: Oh , that ’ s very kind of you . I am going to the Garden Hotel .

speaker: speaker2
text: I am going there , too . We can walk together .
